subject: Create E2E test script with real gemini invocation
description:
Create scripts/test_gemini_slave_e2e.sh:

```bash
#!/bin/bash
# E2E test suite for gemini-slave Go implementation
set -euo pipefail

BINARY="${1:-./gemini-slave}"
PASS=0
FAIL=0

test_case() {
    local name="$1"
    local cmd="$2"
    local check="$3"
    
    echo -n "Test: $name... "
    if eval "$cmd" 2>/dev/null | eval "$check" > /dev/null 2>&1; then
        echo "✓ PASS"
        ((PASS++))
    else
        echo "✗ FAIL"
        ((FAIL++))
    fi
}

echo "=== Gemini-Slave E2E Tests ==="
echo "Binary: $BINARY"
echo ""

# Test 1: Large stdin (THE BUG)
test_case "Large stdin capture (50KB)" \
    "find cmd/gogent-scout -name '*.go' -exec cat {} \\; | $BINARY mapper 'Map entry points' -o json" \
    "jq -e '.entry_points'"

# Test 2: File arguments
test_case "File arguments" \
    "$BINARY deps 'Extract deps' cmd/gogent-scout/*.go -o json" \
    "jq -e '.internal_deps'"

# Test 3: JSON output flag
test_case "JSON output (-o json)" \
    "echo 'package main' | $BINARY architect 'Review' -o json" \
    "jq -e '.overview'"

# Test 4: Model override
test_case "Model override (GEMINI_MODEL)" \
    "GEMINI_MODEL=gemini-3-pro-preview echo 'package main' | $BINARY mapper 'test' -o json" \
    "jq -e '.summary'"

# Test 5: Empty input handling
test_case "Empty input" \
    "$BINARY mapper 'test' < /dev/null" \
    "grep -i 'empty\\|no input\\|INPUT CONTEXT'"

# Test 6: Protocol listing
test_case "Protocol listing" \
    "$BINARY nonexistent 'test' 2>&1 || true" \
    "grep -q 'mapper'"

# Test 7: Help output
test_case "Help flag" \
    "$BINARY --help" \
    "grep -q 'Usage:'"

echo ""
echo "=== Results ==="
echo "Passed: $PASS"
echo "Failed: $FAIL"
[ $FAIL -eq 0 ] && exit 0 || exit 1
```

Make executable and add to Makefile.
